title: Feature: Tool Call Tracking in SpacetimeDB — dual-write, dashboard feed, cost aggregation
description: Store hex dev tool calls in SpacetimeDB for cross-machine persistence, dashboard visibility, and cost aggregation. Dual-write from local session files + nexus REST.

phases.name: SpacetimeDB Schema
phases.description: Add the table and reducer to the WASM module

phases.name: hex-nexus REST
phases.description: Add POST and GET endpoints for tool calls

phases.name: hex-cli Integration
phases.description: Dual-write from session and read in report

phases.name: Dashboard & Analytics
phases.description: Tool call feed panel and aggregation queries

steps.description: Add dev_tool_call table and log_tool_call reducer to hexflo-coordination WASM module. Fields: id (auto_inc), session_id, agent_id, project_id, timestamp, phase, tool, model, tokens, cost_usd, duration_ms, status, detail. Publish module to SpacetimeDB.
Add POST /api/hexflo/tool-calls (log a call) and GET /api/hexflo/tool-calls?session_id= (list calls) to hex-nexus. POST calls the SpacetimeDB reducer. GET queries via SQL. Register routes in mod.rs.

Update session.log_tool_call() to dual-write: local JSON (synchronous) + POST to hex-nexus /api/hexflo/tool-calls (async, fire-and-forget). Use tokio::spawn for the nexus call so it doesn't block the pipeline.

Update hex report to read tool calls from SpacetimeDB (GET /api/hexflo/tool-calls?session_id=) first, fallback to local session file. Add 'Tools Called' section to the report output showing each call with timestamp, phase, tool, model, tokens, cost, duration, status.

Add Tool Call Feed panel to dashboard. Subscribe to dev_tool_call table via SpacetimeDB WebSocket. Show real-time call stream with color-coded status (green=ok, red=error, yellow=retry). Filter by session, agent, or phase.
Add aggregation endpoints: GET /api/hexflo/tool-calls/summary (cost per model, cost per project, error rate per phase, slowest calls). Wire into hex report --summary and dashboard analytics panel.
